name: Carrot 1.0 nozzle
machine_start_gcode:
MMU_START_SETUP INITIAL_TOOL={initial_tool} TOTAL_TOOLCHANGES=!total_toolchanges! REFERENCED_TOOLS=!referenced_tools! TOOL_COLORS=!colors! TOOL_TEMPS=!temperatures! TOOL_MATERIALS=!materials! FILAMENT_NAMES=!filament_names! PURGE_VOLUMES=!purge_volumes!
PRINT_START EXTRUDER=[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer] BED=[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] Chamber=[chamber_temperature] PRINT_MIN={first_layer_print_min[0]},{first_layer_print_min[1]} PRINT_MAX={first_layer_print_max[0]},{first_layer_print_max[1]} LAYERS=[total_layer_count] TOOL=[initial_tool]
